title: 10 best herbal teas for pimples
description: Curly dock teas helps with pimples because it contains powerful antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe and calm the skin. The tea's astringent properties also help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, while its antimicrobial properties combat bacterial infections that can cause breakouts. Additionally, curly dock teas' natural astringency helps to tighten pores, reducing their appearance and preventing clogged pores that can lead to pimples....
